query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph showing the left side of a person's face wearing a baseball cap, with their shadow cast on a light-colored wall behind them. The shadow shows the person's profile including the cap brim. The image captures a partial view with the right portion of the frame dominated by the bright wall and shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred black and white photograph with soft focus throughout, showing only the left edge of a person's face in a baseball cap while their shadow appears on a bright wall. The composition aggressively crops the subject at the frame edge, leaving most of the face outside the image, while motion blur or soft focus smears details into indistinct tonal masses and vertical artifacts streak across the frame.
